input.description: Path to a CSV samplesheet with headers: sample,species_a,species_b,source_a,source_b

bbknn_input.description: Path to a CSV BBKNN samplesheet with headers: sample,species_a,species_b,source_a,source_b (.h5ad inputs)

outdir.description: Directory where pipeline outputs are written

harmony_container.description: Container image for the Harmony module process

seurat4_container.description: Container image for the Seurat4 module process

fastmnn_container.description: Container image for the fastMNN module process

bbknn_container.description: Container image for the BBKNN module process
